conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the interior angle sum formula of a polygon in geometric calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the interior angle sum of a polygon is: its form is (n^2 - n) × 90°.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the interior angle sum when the number of sides n is known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
